fun plan(repoRoot: String, repository: String, pullRequestNumber: Int): Verdict {
    val contextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val maintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val principles = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val prMeta = githubReadPullRequest(repository, pullRequestNumber)
    val prFiles = githubReadPullRequestFiles(repository, pullRequestNumber)
    val prDiff = githubReadPullRequestDiff(repository, pullRequestNumber)
    val touchedDomains = identifyTouchedDomains(prFiles, repoIndex)
    val relevantContext = readRelevantRepoContext("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context", touchedDomains)
    val sourceChanges = filterSourceChanges(prDiff)
    val testChanges = filterTestChanges(prDiff)
    val buildFiles = filterBuildAndHarnessChanges(prDiff)
    val existingTestPatterns = searchRepository("repo:SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem path:test OR path:src/test")
    val sourceBackedClaims = confirmClaimsAgainstDiff(sourceChanges, testChanges, existingTestPatterns, relevantContext)
    val riskProfile = assessInfrastructureRisk(sourceChanges, buildFiles, principles)
    val testAdequacy = evaluateTestsUpdatedAppropriately(sourceBackedClaims, riskProfile, testChanges, existingTestPatterns)
    val verdict = makeTestsUpdatedVerdict(testAdequacy)
    return verdict
}
